items.title: Stripe, Advent make $53 billion takeover offer for PayPal, sending stock soaring
items.description: Stripe and Advent International have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would valued at more than $53 billion.

items.title: Trump's attorney general nominee Todd Blanche faces Senate Judiciary questions
items.description: Todd Blanche previously served as a criminal defense lawyer for President Donald Trump.

items.title: Warren Buffett tells CNBC he initiated Berkshire Hathaway's investment in Alphabet
items.description: Warren Buffett said he was the driving force behind the conglomerate's recent big investment in Alphabet.

items.title: We're buying more of Jim Cramer's favorite chip stock for the second time this week
items.description: We also added to our position on Monday.

items.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano will lead Trump accounts expansion
items.description: The Treasury Department is putting a top official in charge of the new program as it enrolls millions of families.

items.title: Treasury yields are flat as traders weigh encouraging inflation data vs. oil rebound
items.description: Treasury yields were edged higher as investors awaited the latest producer price inflation print for June.

items.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
items.description: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

items.title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
items.description: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

items.title: Americans say they need $1.2 million to retire comfortably, survey finds — but many expect to fall short
items.description: Just 30% of workplace retirement plan investors think they'll reach $1 million before retiring, a new survey finds. Here's what's getting in their way.

items.title: Buffett says Trump's pick of Kevin Warsh for Fed chair was 'good choice'
items.description: Warren Buffett believes Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will do the best job he can.

items.title: Morgan Stanley posts record quarterly revenue and profit as equities trading surges 69%
items.description: Like at peers Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase, a massive beat in equities trading drove the quarter's outsized results.

items.title: Mortgage rates rise to highest level in nearly a year, causing homebuyers to pause
items.description: Mortgage rates moved higher last week, causing buyers to pull back, but refinancing did see small gains.

items.title: Warren Buffett calls Bill Gates' actions with Epstein 'distasteful,' but people make mistakes
items.description: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman left out the Gates Foundation from his annual charitable stock gifts for the first time in 20 years.

items.title: U.S. launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran, as analysts warn conflict risks becoming 'forever war'
items.description: Fighting in the Middle East has intensified in recent days, but could escalate further if Iran fails to cooperate, President Donald Trump said.

items.title: Goldman Sachs' Ruemmler to face House questioning on Jeffrey Epstein
items.description: Kathryn Ruemmler said earlier this year she would leave Goldman Sachs at the end of June after fallout over her emails with Jeffrey Epstein.

items.title: Alibaba’s U.S.-listed shares rise 4% after Qwen AI set to be integrated in Apple Intelligence
items.description: The Cyberspace Administration of China on Wednesday included Apple's AI services on a list of approved providers.

items.title: Star analyst Dan Ives forms Yorkville Ives merchant bank after leaving Wedbush
items.description: The new firm, Yorkville Ives & Co., will combine investment banking, equity research, institutional trading and principal investing.

items.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
items.description: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

items.title: ASML rises 3% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
items.description: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.

items.title: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
items.description: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.
